Don’t forget to clip the on-page 50% coupon to see the discounted price at checkout. This model has sold for as much as $44 in recent months, so today’s offer knocks a solid $29 off the going rate. It doesn’t get much less than this for a Qi2 15W charging station, which even comes with a 20W adapter and a 3.3-foot USB-C cable, so be sure to snag it after getting more details below.

items.title: This travel-ready 7-in-1 power strip packs 65W USB-C for $27 (Save $10)
items.summary:
ORICO 65W 7-in-1 USB-C Travel Power Strip

Buy for $27 (Reg. $37)

Clip the on-page 10% off coupon.

What we love

A lot of the affordable power strips with USB-C tend to top out at 15-20W, but this travel-ready solution steps things up to 65W. This makes it powerful enough to top off a wide variety of devices ranging from smartphones to tablets, laptops, and the list goes on. It’s a versatile solution with 3 AC outlets, two USB-A ports, and a couple of Type-C outputs in tow.

This is regularly a $60 unit that has only seen a handful of discounts to date since its debut. Today’s deal marks the steepest discount we’ve tracked for it to date, with a 33% markdown landing it $2 below its previous all-time low. We’ve seen the standard variant and even the Pokémon edition model go for less in the past, but this is the first time we’re seeing this model hit this price. It’s a pretty good option to consider if you’re in the market to buy something unique for your battlestation, and you can learn more about it in detail below.
